title: Heart on a Tip
description: A delicate heart carved into graphite, exploring the intersection of fragility and permanence. Each curve was shaped over 20 hours of patient, deliberate work.

title: Miniature Temple
description: Precision architecture at microscopic scale. A sacred space carved with devotion, where every pillar and arch emerged from patience.

title: Elephant of Grace
description: Strength made small. This elephant carries the weight of patience in its delicate form, trunk raised in silent greeting.

title: Lotus Bloom
description: Petals unfurling from carbon. Each layer carved to catch light differently, creating depth in a space smaller than a fingertip.

title: Chain of Links
description: Three interconnected links carved from a single pencil tip. A meditation on connection and the impossible made possible.

title: Hand in Prayer
description: Folded hands emerging from graphite, fingers interlaced in silent devotion. 35 hours of carving for a moment of stillness.

title: Spiral Staircase
description: An ascending spiral carved with mathematical precision. Each step leads nowhere and everywhere at once.

title: Guitar Miniature
description: A six-stringed instrument at impossible scale. The strings are mere suggestions, yet the music feels real.

title: Rose in Bloom
description: Layered petals carved from darkness into form. Fragility preserved in the hardest softness.

title: Standing Buddha
description: Serenity at microscopic scale. The figure stands in eternal calm, carved over 40 hours of meditative focus.

title: Taj Mahal
description: A monument to love, recreated on a pencil tip. Domes and minarets rise from graphite, impossibly precise.

title: Interlocked Hearts
description: Two hearts carved as one, inseparable. A testament to connection and the patience love requires.
